hero.name: Ekaterina Kovaleva
hero.subtitle: Frontend Developer
hero.description: I build modern web applications with high performance and smooth animations. Turning ideas and designs into interactive code.

about.subtitle: 01. About Me
about.description: I am a Frontend Developer with commercial experience in building modern web applications. I specialize in the React ecosystem and creating smooth user interfaces. My background includes both greenfield development and maintaining/refactoring legacy codebases. I integrate easily into distributed teams, following Git-flow, conducting code reviews, and writing clear documentation. I have a B2 level of English, sufficient for reading technical literature and professional correspondence. I can not only implement Figma designs 'pixel-perfect' but also suggest improvements to enhance usability and accessibility.

manicure.title: Manicure Specialist Portfolio
manicure.description: A modern single-page business card website. Optimized for high performance and fast loading speeds.

rickmorty.title: Rick and Morty API Viewer
rickmorty.description: An interface for interacting with a public API, featuring character search and filtering functionality.

coffee.title: Coffee House
coffee.description: Pixel-perfect layout from a design mock-up. A two-page site with smooth scrolling, animations, and full responsiveness, built using pure JS and CSS.

calendar.title: Long Journey Calendar
calendar.description: A small art project built with Next.js using Server-Side Rendering (SSR). Focused on responsiveness and user experience (UX).

crypto.title: CryptoTracker
crypto.description: A real-time cryptocurrency tracking app. Integrated WebSockets to display live market data.

arendomania.title: Arendomania
arendomania.description: A vacation rental booking platform for the Russian market. Project is currently in active development.

contacts.subtitle: 04. Contact
contacts.text: Open to interesting projects and offers
